About Me

Every Frame
Has a Story

Hi, I'm Vishma Kuldip — a passionate photographer living in Dortmund, Germany. Under the brand SATI.S.PHID, I bring my Canon and my love for genuine moments to every session.

Photography, for me, is not about creating perfect scenes — it's about finding the perfect truth in imperfect moments. Whether I'm capturing a laughing group of friends in Westfalen Park, a lone goose gliding across still water, or the warmth of golden light on a face on a Dortmund street — I'm always chasing the soul behind the surface.

Equipment & Approach

Gear, Philosophy
& Process

📷

Canon DSLR Body

Professional Canon DSLR providing full-frame image quality, excellent low-light performance and reliable autofocus for every situation.

🔭

L-Series Lenses

Canon's professional-grade L-Series glass delivers exceptional sharpness, beautiful bokeh, and vibrant colour rendition across all focal lengths.

🖥️

Professional Editing

Every image is individually edited in Lightroom and Photoshop — colour-graded for mood, retouched with care, delivered in high resolution.

How It Works

The Process

01

Enquire

Fill in the contact form or send a WhatsApp. We'll discuss your vision and find the perfect session type.

02

Plan

We agree on a date, location, look and feel. I'll suggest the best Dortmund spots for your session.

03

Shoot

A relaxed, guided session at your chosen location. I'll direct you naturally — no stiff posing.

04

Deliver

Professionally edited images delivered within 7 days via high-resolution digital download gallery.
